summary: Notion AI is enhancing its developer-facing SDK with improved filtering capabilities for database queries and richer comment formatting via Markdown support. These updates signal continued investment in empowering third-party integrations and automations, strengthening Notion's ecosystem moat against competitors like Coda and ClickUp.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.18.0 adds multi-value filters for select, status, and multi_select properties
signals.insight: Enables more sophisticated, granular database querying in integrations—critical for enterprise automation workflows and a competitive differentiator over rivals with less flexible API filtering.

signals.title: notion-sdk-js v5.17.0 adds markdown parameter to Create Comment endpoint
signals.insight: Allows rich-text formatting in automated comments (e.g., from AI agents or CI/CD bots), improving UX fidelity and enabling more persuasive, contextual AI-generated feedback within Notion threads.
